name: ALPHA BRAIN
statblock: AC 7, HP 70, ATK 3 mind shred (far) +6 (5d6), MV none, S +0, D -3, C +3, I +6, W +4, Ch +5, AL C, LV 15
description: A giant, pink brain floating in a pool of green ichor. Brain eaters and brain dogs are born from cysts that grow and break free from it.

abilities.name: Telepathic
abilities.description: Can hear the surface thoughts of all creatures within a mile and speak telepathically with up to four creatures at a time. DC 15 CHA to resist its commands.

name: BRAIN DOG
statblock: AC 11, HP 15, ATK 1 bite +3 (1d6) or 1 stun, MV near, S +2, D +1, C +2, I +2, W +1, Ch +0, AL C, LV 3
description: A wet, purple brain with dog-like legs. Guards brain eater colonies.

abilities.name: Stun
abilities.description: One creature in near DC 12 INT or paralyzed 1d4 rounds.

name: BRAIN EATER, ELDER
attack: 4 tentacle +6 (1d8 + latch) or 1 mind blast or 1 mind control
statblock: AC 16 (mithral chain), HP 45, ATK 4 tentacle +6 (1d8 + latch) or 1 mind blast or 1 mind control, MV near, S +2, D +3, C +0, I +4, W +2, Ch +4, AL C, LV 10
description: Nine elder brain eaters tend directly to the alpha brain, acting as its lieutenants. They gain some of its telepathic power in return.

abilities.name: Telepathic
abilities.description: Can hear the surface thoughts of all creatures within far and speak telepathically with up to two creatures at a time. DC 12 CHA to resist its commands.

abilities.name: Latch
abilities.description: Tentacles attach to hit targets, automatically hitting the next round (DC 12 STR to remove 1d4 tentacles). If all four remain latched onto the same humanoid target for 1 round, the target's brain is ripped out and devoured.

abilities.name: Mind Blast
abilities.description: Fills a near-sized cube extending from brain eater. DC 15 INT or 3d6 damage and paralyzed 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.description: One target in near DC 15 CHA or brain eater controls for 1d4 rounds.

name: CRABSTROSITY
statblock: AC 15, HP 56, ATK 2 claw +6 (near) (1d10 + crush) and 1 tentacle +6 (1d12 + toxin), MV double near (swim), S +4, D +1, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 12
description: Jointed, purple tentacles writhe inside the grasping mouth of a giant crab with a blue-green shell.

abilities.name: Crush
abilities.description: DC 15 STR or target takes 1d10 damage.

abilities.name: Toxin
abilities.description: DC 12 CHA or compulsion to protect crabstrosity for 1d4 rounds.

name: STING BARNACLE
statblock: AC 10, HP 1, ATK none, MV close (swim), S -3, D +0, C +0, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 0
description: Crusty, white parasites that cling to the shells of deep-sea horrors.

abilities.name: Toxin
abilities.description: A creature who touches the sting barnacle with bare flesh DC 12 CON or paralyzed 1d4 rounds.

name: HEAL CUBE
statblock: AC 11, HP 24, ATK 1 touch +4 (engulf + heal), MV near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -4, W +1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 5
description: A massive cube of clear slime with a faint, pink color. Plump mice and centipedes drift around inside.

abilities.name: Engulf
abilities.description: DC 12 STR or trapped inside cube. DC 12 STR on turn to escape.

abilities.name: Heal
abilities.description: Creatures in cube heal 1 HP per round. Treat as if underwater.

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

name: MAGNETIC CUBE
statblock: AC 11, HP 24, ATK 1 touch +4 (1d8 + engulf), MV near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -4, W +1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 5
description: A gray cube of wobbly, translucent ooze. Dented helms and chipped swords float around inside it.

abilities.name: Engulf
abilities.description: DC 12 STR or trapped inside cube. Touch attack auto-hits engulfed targets each round. DC 12 STR on turn to escape.

abilities.name: Magnetic
abilities.description: DC 12 STR each round to hold onto large metal objects in near range or they are engulfed (creatures in armor also engulfed).

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

name: NECROTIC CUBE
statblock: AC 11, HP 24, ATK 1 touch +4 (1d8 + engulf), MV near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -4, W +1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 5
description: A green-tinted cube of clear jelly with bleached skeletons adrift inside.

abilities.name: Engulf
abilities.description: DC 12 STR or trapped inside cube. Touch attack auto-hits engulfed targets each round. DC 12 STR on turn to escape.

abilities.name: Necrotic
abilities.description: A creature who dies while engulfed becomes a skeleton.

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

abilities.name: Skeletons
abilities.description: Necrotic cubes have 1d6 skeletons inside them. Each round, one escapes to attack the cube's enemies on a d6 roll of 1-3.

name: MAZZIM THE MESMERIST
statblock: AC 10, HP 45, ATK 2 spell +6, MV near, S -1, D +0, C +0, I +4, W +1, Ch +3, AL C, LV 10
description: A malevolent sorcerer who has mastered the arcane arts of illusion, hypnotism, and deception.

abilities.name: Skullcap of Ord
abilities.description: Three times per day, cast a spell with advantage or choose a spell being cast within far to have disadvantage.

abilities.name: Crystal of Mind Warping
abilities.description: If a creature looks into the crystal for three consecutive rounds, the wielder can alter one of the creature's memories in a plausible way or implant a new memory that could reasonably be true.

abilities.name: Enchant (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. Close, one humanoid target. The target regards the caster as a good friend for 1d6 rounds.

abilities.name: Illusion (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Far. Conjure a convincing visible and audible illusion up to the size of a sailing ship within range. Touching the illusion or passing a DC 15 INT check reveals its false nature. It lasts 1d6 rounds.

abilities.name: Mesmerism (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 14. Near, focus. All humanoid creatures in range must pass a CHA check vs. the last spellcasting check at the start of their turn or stand agape, staring at unseen images.

name: LORD HEDRON ANTIOCH
statblock: AC 15, HP 57, ATK 3 bite +8 (1d8 + blood drain) and 1 charm, MV near (climb), S +4, D +3, C +3, I +2, W +3, Ch +5, AL C, LV 12
description: Lord Hedron Antioch broods in his twisted castle rising high over the gloomy village of Skalvin. He was once a dashing explorer, but returned from the jungles of Tal-Yool as something far darker.

abilities.name: Supreme Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Only damaged by magical sources.

abilities.name: Blood Drain
abilities.description: Hedron heals 2d8 HP and target permanently loses 1d6 CON. At 0 CON, target dies and rises as vampire or vampire spawn (Hedron chooses).

abilities.name: Charm
abilities.description: One humanoid target who can see Hedron within near, DC 15 CHA or under Hedron's control for 1d4 days.

abilities.name: Dire Shapechange
abilities.description: In place of attacks, turn into a giant bat, dire wolf, or back into regular form.

abilities.name: Heart of Darkness
abilities.description: Hedron is the progeny of Obe-Ixx, the Ur-Vampire; her ancient evil suffuses his soul. Holy magic targeting him is DC 18 to cast.

abilities.name: Vampire
abilities.description: Must sleep in a coffin daily or loses 2d6 HP each day that can't be healed until resting in coffin. Takes 3d8 damage each round while in direct sunlight. Cannot be killed unless pierced through heart with a wooden stake while at 0 HP.

name: FUNGIBOLD
attack: 1 sling (far) +1 (1d4) or 1 claw +1 (1d4) or 1 spore blast
statblock: AC 11, HP 6, ATK 1 sling (far) +1 (1d4) or 1 claw +1 (1d4) or 1 spore blast, MV near, S -2, D +1, C +2, I +1, W +0, Ch -1, AL N, LV 1
description: Tiny body. Big hat. This kobold bears a weighty, peaked mushroom cap on its head; the fungi's vein-like roots merge seamlessly into its neck.

abilities.name: Hive Mind
abilities.description: Can telepathically speak with other fungibolds within a mile.

abilities.name: Spore Blast
abilities.description: Enemies in near DC 12 CON or fall asleep 1d4 rounds. Creatures who pass are immune for 1 day.

name: FUNGIBOLD, MAGI
attack: 2 mind melt (far) +4 (2d6) or 1 spell +4 or 1 spore blast
statblock: AC 6, HP 30, ATK 2 mind melt (far) +4 (2d6) or 1 spell +4 or 1 spore blast, MV none, S -4, D -4, C +3, I +1, W +3, Ch +3, AL N, LV 6
description: A pale, fat mushroom of waist height with a scintillating cap of flowing colors. A smooth, lizard-like face is carved into the flesh of the stem. A knowing intelligence winks in its black, glittering eyes.

abilities.name: Hive Mind
abilities.description: Can telepathically speak with other fungibolds within a mile.

abilities.name: Spore Blast
abilities.description: Enemies in near DC 12 CON or fall asleep 1d4 rounds. Creatures who pass are immune for 1 day.

abilities.name: Confusion (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Far, one target. DC 15 WIS or target can't take actions and moves in a random direction on its turn for 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Mind Meld (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 11. Near, one target creature. DC 12 WIS or target connected to Hive Mind as if it were a fungibold. Lasts 1 day.

abilities.name: Poison Spores (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. All non-fungibolds in near DC 12 CON or take 1d6 damage per round (cumulative if from multiple spells). DC 12 CON on turn to end all effects.

name: THE MAD JESTER
attack: 3 juggling knives (close/near) +6 (1d6) and 1 got your nose and 1 dazzling orb
statblock: AC 14, HP 40, ATK 3 juggling knives (close/near) +6 (1d6) and 1 got your nose and 1 dazzling orb, MV near (climb), S +1, D +4, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +3, AL C, LV 9
description: Prospero was once the Overlord's favored jester, a supreme acrobat and showman with fey magic in his blood. He intercepted a mind-shattering spell meant for his liege and was never the same again.

abilities.name: Dazzling Orb
abilities.description: All creatures in near DC 15 CON or blinded for 1 round by a brilliant flash of multicolored light.

abilities.name: Got Your Nose
abilities.description: The Jester makes a DC 15 DEX check to magically pluck an ear, nose, or eye from a creature within close. Stolen anatomy stored in a bag the Jester carries (can be re-attached by placing in original location).

abilities.name: Induce Fugue
abilities.description: Each time a creature misses an attack or fails a spellcasting check targeting The Mad Jester, that creature loses 1 XP (0 minimum).

abilities.name: Tumble
abilities.description: In place of attacks, move up to double near. The Mad Jester's AC becomes 18 until the start of his next turn.

name: DEMON, LASH
statblock: AC 13, HP 23, ATK 2 claw (near) +4 (1d6 + bind), MV near, S +2, D +3, C +1, I -1, W -1, Ch -1, AL C, LV 5
description: Blood-red demon with oily skin. The size of a human, but stretched thin like tallow. Its claw-tipped limbs lash out with unnatural reach.

abilities.name: Bind
abilities.description: Contested DEX to hold target immobile for one round.

abilities.name: Boneless
abilities.description: ADV on DEX checks to sneak and hide. Can slither through small spaces such as keyholes.

abilities.name: Vanity
abilities.description: Creatures have ADV on CHA checks or reaction checks when appealing to the demon's vanity.

name: SISTER MARJORY
attack: 2 sacred flail +7 (1d10 + holy flames) and 2 spell +6
statblock: AC 16 (+1 plate mail), HP 37, ATK 2 sacred flail +7 (1d10 + holy flames) and 2 spell +6, MV near, S +2, D +0, C +1, I +1, W +4, Ch +2, AL L, LV 8
description: The head of the order. Weathered and grim. Wears an eyepatch. Does not tolerate cowardice or laziness.

abilities.name: Holy Flames
abilities.description: Deals +2d6 damage against chaotic creatures.

abilities.name: Angel Wings (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Self. Fly double near for 5 rounds.

abilities.name: Exorcise (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. Near. End a possession by a chaotic entity.

abilities.name: Gaze of St. Sofia (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 14. One chaotic creature in far 2d6 damage. Marjory regains 1d8 HP.

name: LITTLE SISTER
statblock: AC 13 (chain mail), HP 10, ATK 1 flail +2 (1d10) or 1 spell +2, MV near, S +1, D +0, C +1, I +0, W +2, Ch +0, AL L, LV 2
description: A young woman in a crisp nun's habit. Radiates quiet confidence.

abilities.name: Exorcise (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. Near. End a possession by a chaotic entity.

abilities.name: Flog (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 11. One chaotic creature in near 1d6 damage.

name: ELDER SISTER
statblock: AC 15 (plate mail), HP 19, ATK 1 blessed flail +4 (1d10 + bind) and 1 spell +3, MV near, S +2, D +0, C +1, I +1, W +3, Ch +1, AL L, LV 4
description: A middle-aged woman in a well worn nun's habit. Stoic and fearless.

abilities.name: Bind
abilities.description: Chaotic creature DC 12 CON or paralyzed 1 round.

abilities.name: Exorcise (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. Near. End a possession by a chaotic entity.

abilities.name: Seal (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Close, one chaotic creature. 5 rounds. DISADV on attacks and spellcasting checks.

abilities.name: Scourge (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. Near, one chaotic creature. 1d10 damage.

name: THE PIPER
attack: 2 discordant note (near) +9 (1d8), 1 sever shadow +7 and 1 puppetry
statblock: AC 14 (leather armor), HP 49, ATK 2 discordant note (near) +9 (1d8), 1 sever shadow +7 and 1 puppetry, MV near (climb), S +2, D +3, C +4, I +3, W +2, Ch +5, AL C, LV 10
description: A thin man cloaked in once-bright robes smiles widely beneath his hood. He carries a bone-white flute in knuckled hands, trilling and warbling as he meanders through the streets.

abilities.name: Cursed Flute
abilities.description: A magical flute with two powers, each usable once per encounter. Ratsplosion: summon a loyal swarm of rats; if common folk are nearby, up to 2d6 of them melt down into the rats. Dissolve Into Rats: if below 10 HP, The Piper explodes into a swarm of rats and flees — the one albino rat is The Piper. If a humanoid bears the flute for 2d6 days, that person becomes The Piper.

abilities.name: Pay The Piper
abilities.description: If you don't pay The Piper for an agreed-upon debt, a curse strikes you in 1d4 days. You suddenly rise and dance out of town into the wilderness as far as you can go for 2d4 days without rest.

abilities.name: Puppetry
abilities.description: One target in near. DC 15 CHA or use next action to attack ally.

abilities.name: Sever Shadow
abilities.description: The target creature's shadow peels off and becomes a hostile shadow (Shadowdark RPG pg. 250).

name: THE SHADOWBARGE
statblock: AC 20, HP 81, ATK 4 spectral cannons (near) +10 (2d10), MV far (sail), S +0, D +0, C +5, I +3, W +4, Ch +0, AL N, LV 17
description: This massive, ethereal vessel skims across the fabric of reality, a ghostly galleon said to be steered by lost souls. It glides silently through the night, appearing where the veil between worlds is thinnest.

abilities.name: Legendary Vessel
abilities.description: The Shadowbarge is a ship of legend and is immune to conventional damage. It can only be harmed by magical sources.

abilities.name: Soul Anchor
abilities.description: The Shadowbarge is anchored in reality by 2d6 wraiths that man it. If the souls are released or put to rest, the Shadowbarge may fade from existence.

abilities.name: Ethereal Sailing
abilities.description: Traverses ethereal and material planes at will, bypassing physical obstacles and appearing without warning. Can only be halted by local festivals, where it docks to partake in the celebrations.

abilities.name: Wail of the Damned
abilities.description: Once per day, the Shadowbarge can emit a ghastly wail. All who hear it within double near DC 15 WIS or be paralyzed with fear for 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Treasure of the Beyond
abilities.description: Holds countless treasures plundered from sunken ships. Roll with advantage on treasure tables.

name: CRAN-GELATINOUS CUBE
statblock: AC 11, HP 42, ATK 1 touch +6 (1d12 + engulf) and 3 tentacle (near) +6 (1d8), MV near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -4, W +1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 9
description: In the darkest bogs and chilliest swamps, a blood-red cube slurps along the muddy earth. Glistening cranberry juice beads from its sides, and leathery corpses swirl around within its towering bulk.

abilities.name: Peat Zombies
abilities.description: The cube expels 2d4 allied zombies at the start of combat.

abilities.name: Rubbery
abilities.description: Half damage from stabbing weapons.

abilities.name: Cranberry Juice
abilities.description: The first time the cube takes damage each round, all enemies in close DC 12 CON or blinded until the end of their turn.

abilities.name: Engulf
abilities.description: DC 15 STR or trapped inside cube. Touch attack auto-hits engulfed targets each round. DC 15 STR on turn to escape.

abilities.name: Dissolve
abilities.description: Living creatures inside the cube take 1d12 damage on the cube's turn.

name: FIRE GOBLIN
statblock: AC 11, HP 5, ATK 1 club +0 (1d4) or 1 fire blast (far) +1 (1d6 + burn), MV near, S +0, D +1, C +1, I -1, W -1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 1
description: Triumphant goblins with crescent moon smiles and flickering eyes.

abilities.name: Keen Senses
abilities.description: Can't be surprised.

abilities.name: Burn
abilities.description: Flammable objects the target carries ignite (1d4 damage on turn).

name: BLAST GOBLIN
statblock: AC 14 (chainmail), HP 20, ATK 1 burning spear (near) +3 (1d8), MV near, S +2, D +1, C +2, I -1, W +0, Ch +1, AL C, LV 4
description: Gouts of fire burst out of this muscled goblin's mouth with each howling war cry.

abilities.name: Keen Senses
abilities.description: Can't be surprised.

abilities.name: Immolate
abilities.description: When killed, all in near DC 12 DEX or 1d8 damage.

name: ROGGENWULF
statblock: AC 13, HP 32, ATK 3 bite +5 (1d8) or 1 howl, MV double near, S +3, D +1, C +1, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL C, LV 7
description: A slavering wolf demon with peeled-back skin on its face that exposes white bone. Its burning eyes bob like witchlights in the darkness of the cornfields.

abilities.name: Impervious
abilities.description: Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

abilities.name: Howl
abilities.description: All who hear it DC 12 CHA or cannot act on their next turn.

abilities.name: Silver Aversion
abilities.description: Takes double damage from silvered weapons. Cannot cross a threshold that has a silver object hung over it.

name: GREEN KNIGHT
attack: 2 bastard sword +4 (1d10) or 1 horn of Gede
statblock: AC 15 (plate mail), HP 19, ATK 2 bastard sword +4 (1d10) or 1 horn of Gede, MV near, S +3, D +0, C +1, I +0, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 4
description: Armored knights wearing cloaks of green leaves and helms of twisted branches. It is said that when they are wounded, flower petals fall instead of droplets of blood.

abilities.name: Horn of Gede
abilities.description: Once per day, blow the horn to become impervious to all damage for 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Oath
abilities.description: 3/day, ADV on a roll made in service of protecting the wilds and natural creatures.

name: LANTERN HEAD
attack: 3 scimitar +5 (1d6) and 1 throw head (near) +5 (1d6 + chomp) and 1 steal flame
statblock: AC 11, HP 29, ATK 3 scimitar +5 (1d6) and 1 throw head (near) +5 (1d6 + chomp) and 1 steal flame, MV near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I +0, W +1, Ch +3, AL C, LV 6
description: A pirate in rotting garb stands with his own severed head bouncing in his hand! In place of a cranium, a werelight lantern juts from his neck.

abilities.name: Greater Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

abilities.name: Chomp
abilities.description: Attach to a target hit by the Throw Head attack; the attack automatically hits again next round. DC 12 STR on turn to tear the head off. Once removed, the head rolls a near distance toward Lantern Head on his turn.

abilities.name: Steal Flame
abilities.description: Steal the light from one light source within double near. The light source is extinguished, and the light transfers into Lantern Head's lantern.

abilities.name: Will-o'-Wisp
abilities.description: In place of attacks, Lantern Head transforms the light in his lantern into an allied will-o'-wisp that joins the fight. The light in his lantern is extinguished.

name: NAGA, JEWEL
statblock: AC 16, HP 57, ATK 3 bite +7 (2d8 + poison) and 1 spell +7, MV near (climb), S +4, D +1, C +3, I +2, W +4, Ch +4, AL L, LV 12
description: A gem-encrusted, hooded cobra with a wise countenance. Delicate gold cuffs and ornaments dot the length of its coiled, 15-foot body.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: DC 15 CON or paralyzed 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Being (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. End all spells affecting one target in near.

abilities.name: Knowing (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. Learn the answer to a yes or no question.

abilities.name: Seeming (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Focus. Create a convincing illusion within near up to the size of the naga.

name: JOLLY ROGER
attack: 2 scimitar +6 (1d6 + sap) and 1 touch +6 (1d6 + life drain)
statblock: AC 14, HP 36, ATK 2 scimitar +6 (1d6 + sap) and 1 touch +6 (1d6 + life drain), MV near (fly), S -4, D +4, C +0, I +0, W +0, Ch +3, AL C, LV 8
description: A fluttering, black cloth drapes over a stooped figure floating silently on the deck. A skull and crossbones leers out of the cloth's dark folds!

abilities.name: Greater Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: 1d4 CON damage. Death if reduced to 0 CON.

abilities.name: Sap
abilities.description: Jolly roger heals 1d4 HP.

abilities.name: Walk The Plank
abilities.description: In place of attacks, all creatures within near DC 12 CHA or throw themselves overboard as their next action.

name: HYDRA WORM
statblock: AC 16, HP variable (see Heads), ATK 1 bite (near) +8 (1d12 + swallow) per head, MV double near (burrow), S +5, D +1, C +3, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV variable
description: A towering, multi-headed desert worm with segmented armor hide. The older a hydra worm gets, the more heads it sprouts from past injuries.

abilities.name: Heads
abilities.description: Choose how many heads the worm has. Each is LV 2, AC 16, HP 9, and can make 1 bite attack. A killed head sprouts into two new heads at the start of the worm's turn unless cauterized beforehand. The worm's LV and total HP is that of all the heads combined, plus 3.

abilities.name: Swallow
abilities.description: On a natural attack roll of 18-20, target is swallowed. Total darkness inside and 2d10 damage per round. Worm regurgitates all swallowed if dealt at least 20 damage in one round to the inside of its gullet.

name: ZOMBLOB
statblock: AC 10, HP 14, ATK 2 clawed tentacle +3 (1d6), MV near (climb), S +2, D +0, C +1, I -4, W -3, Ch +1, AL C, LV 3
description: A sickly purple carpet of rolling sludge. Eyeballs, organs, and partially dissolved bones bubble up before being reabsorbed.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks.

abilities.name: Endless Guts
abilities.description: If at 1 HP or higher, regain 1d4 HP at start of turn.

abilities.name: Relentless
abilities.description: If zomblob is reduced to 0 HP by a non-magical source, DC 9 CON to go to 1 HP instead.

name: HAUNTED MASK
statblock: AC 18, HP 14, ATK 1 bite +3 (1d4), MV close (climb), S -2, D -3, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch +3, AL C, LV 3
description: A mask with exaggerated features that radiate a strong emotion.

abilities.name: Possess
abilities.description: A humanoid who dons the haunted mask must make a DC 15 CHA check. On a failure, the mask possesses it until the wearer falls unconscious or the mask is destroyed.

abilities.name: Emotional Curse
abilities.description: Each mask depicts one emotion with a matching effect on its wearer. Anger: attacks nearest creature each turn, gains 10 temp HP and +1d4 damage. Fear: flees at any sign of danger; uncontrollable screaming attracts attention. Sorrow: turns weapon upon themselves. Mirth: falls to the ground in hideous laughter and begins suffocating.

name: BADGERLING
statblock: AC 13 (leather), HP 9, ATK 1 handaxe (close/near) +2 (1d6), MV near, S +1, D +2, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 2
description: A wild-eyed halfling wearing a badger skin cloak and wielding a sharply honed axe in each hand.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.description: Deal an extra die of damage when undetected.

abilities.name: Invisibility
abilities.description: Once per day, turn invisible for 3 rounds. Attacking ends the invisibility.

name: BADGERLING WARBAND
statblock: AC 13 (leather), HP 48, ATK 1 handaxe (close/near) +5 (3d6), MV near, S +1, D +2, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 6
description: An elite warband of badgerlings who ferociously attack from sudden ambush before withdrawing into a new hidden position.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.description: Deal three extra dice of damage when undetected.

abilities.name: Invisibility
abilities.description: Once per day, turn invisible for 3 rounds. Attacking ends the invisibility.

name: TORCH MIMIC
statblock: AC 12, HP 23, ATK 2 bite +5 (1d8 + stick), MV near, S +2, D +0, C +1, I -2, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 5
description: A stout, brightly burning torch with a terrible secret.

abilities.name: Fireblood
abilities.description: Fire immune.

abilities.name: Surprise
abilities.description: Waits to attack until there is 1 minute left on the torch timer.

abilities.name: Stick
abilities.description: DC 15 STR or adhere to target; auto-hit with bite while adhered. DC 15 STR on turn to remove.

name: MOUTH OF WORDS
statblock: AC 12, HP 20, ATK 1 slam +2 (1d6) or 1 spell +3, MV near, S +2, D -2, C +2, I +2, W -2, Ch -3, AL C, LV 4
description: In an attempt at immortality, a chatterbox wizard cast a spell so that their voice would forever be heard. Their talkative mouth lives on while still attached to their undead corpse.

abilities.name: Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks.

abilities.name: Relentless
abilities.description: If reduced to 0 HP by a non-magical source, DC 15 CON to go to 1 HP instead.

abilities.name: Outer Monologue (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. One target in near can't stop speaking their inner monologue out loud for 1d4 rounds. Attacks and spellcasting checks are made with DISADV for duration.

abilities.name: Sticks and Stones (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Creatures within near are berated with insults that really may break bones. They all take 1d6 damage.

name: QUESTING BEAST
statblock: AC 15, HP 57, ATK 3 bite +7 (2d10 + poison) and 1 fire breath, MV double near, S +4, D +3, C +3, I +3, W +2, Ch +4, AL C, LV 12
description: A true abomination born from a human woman and fathered by a devil. Its head and neck resemble a great snake with the ears of a greyhound and eyes as red as carbuncle. Its legs and hooves are that of a stag, and from the shoulders to the tail, its spots and sleek form resemble a leopard.

abilities.name: Mythic
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

abilities.name: Glatisant
abilities.description: Loud yelps and barks, as if from a dozen hounds, emanate from the beast's belly when it opens its maw. Creatures within near who are not aware of the beast have DISADV on INT, CHA, and WIS based checks.

abilities.name: Fire Breath
abilities.description: Fills a near-sized cube extending from beast. DC 15 DEX or 4d6 damage.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: DC 12 CON or 1d4 CON damage. Death if reduced to 0 CON.

name: PRINCE OF THE FIVE WINDS
attack: 3 scimitar of air +9 (2d12 + blast) or 1 whirlwind
statblock: AC 14, HP 75, ATK 3 scimitar of air +9 (2d12 + blast) or 1 whirlwind, MV double near (fly), S +4, D +4, C +3, I +4, W +3, Ch +3, AL L, LV 16
description: A djinni prince freed from a brass oil lamp after six hundred years of imprisonment. His beard is formed of white clouds, his skin a midnight blue. He crosses his arms, waiting.

abilities.name: Impervious
abilities.description: Only damaged by magical sources.

abilities.name: Blast
abilities.description: Hit targets DC 15 STR or thrown 1d100 feet in a random direction.

abilities.name: Planeshift
abilities.description: Once per day, in place of attacks, teleport to a chosen location on a different plane of existence. Bring up to four willing allies.

abilities.name: Summon Air Elementals
abilities.description: Once per day, in place of attacks, summon two allied air elementals (greater).

abilities.name: Whirlwind
abilities.description: Transform into a lashing tornado. All enemies within near DC 18 DEX or thrown 2d100 feet in a random direction.

abilities.name: Wish
abilities.description: Cast wish once a week for a mortal, no spellcasting check.

name: BLUE LANCER
attack: 1 lance +5 (1d12, x4 damage on critical hit)
statblock: AC 17, HP 20, ATK 1 lance +5 (1d12, x4 damage on critical hit), MV double near, S +3, D -1, C +2, I -1, W +1, Ch +0, AL C, LV 4
description: A knight in blue-steel plate carrying a shield and lance and mounted upon a metallic warhorse.

abilities.name: Statue
abilities.description: When standing still, looks exactly like a metal sculpture.

abilities.name: Mounted
abilities.description: If unhorsed, treat as a Blue Crusher.

name: BLUE CRUSHER
statblock: AC 15, HP 20, ATK 2 spiked ball (near) +5 (1d10), MV near, S +3, D -1, C +2, I -1, W +1, Ch +1, AL C, LV 4
description: A knight in blue-steel plate swinging a vicious spiked ball on a chain. A pair of red witch lights burn behind its shadowed visor.

abilities.name: Statue
abilities.description: When standing still, looks exactly like a suit of armor.
